property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

etbeans\java\maven in;C:\Program Files\OpenSSL-Win64 in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Users\kadan\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\kadan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\kadan\AppData\Roaming
pm;.

testcase.name: contextLoads

org.hibernate.SQL : create table products ( pro_price decimal(38,2), pro_stock integer, pro_type tinyint, mak_id bigint not null, pro_created_at datetime(6), pro_id bigint not null auto_increment, pro_description varchar(255), pro_name varchar(255), primary key (pro_id) ) engine=InnoDB 04:17 DEBUG 14696 --- [t-m_rest] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table roles ( rol_id bigint not null
